verbatim_quote: I agree that we are, in some sense, our interpretability tools are limited in how well we can actually run them and how well they can actually describe the underlying phenomenon. I think basically my sense is, as a first stab, probably the best thing we can do is match these interpretability tools, but we can do this in a much more scalable way.
gloss: [MECHANISM_CLAIM] I agree that we are, in some sense, our interpretability tools are limited in how well we can actually run them and how well they can actually describe the underlying phenomenon...
